ship.releaseNotes:
### Main APP + startup bundle with pre-build engines, optimized for AMPERE, ADA and BLACKWELL architectures.
>Includes GGML Llama.cpp + Tom TQ
>CUDA 13.3 (Frontier) + 12.8 (Stable)
>built on VS2026 + VS2022
ship.appOnlyReleaseNotes:
### App update (`Blackwell-Ops-App-v*.7z`)

Lean portable pack (~5 MB) — **UI + factory templates + bundled 7z**.

**Apply from the in-app UPDATE menu** (download + extract + restart). Keeps existing engines under `runtime/`.

**Choose this if you already have** a Full install or Foundry-built engines.

**First install?** Use the **Full install** Setup.exe instead.
ship.fullBundleReleaseNotes:
### Full install (`Setup` NSIS + provider packs)

Complete installer — **app + templates + pre-built CUDA engines** (Frontier + Stable for GGML Master and Tom TQ).

Also attaches per-provider `.7z` packs for selective engine updates, plus the lean App `.7z`.

**Choose this if you:**
- Are installing for the **first time**
- Need a full engine refresh

CUDA 13.3 (Frontier) + 12.8 (Stable). Portable Foundry toolchain remains on the separate `toolchain` release tag.
